scripts.mobile:sync:android: npm run build:mobile:android && cap sync android
scripts.mobile:build:android: npm run mobile:sync:android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:open:android: npm run mobile:sync:android && cap open android
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run mobile:sync:android && cap run android
scripts.mobile:sync:ios: npm run build:mobile:ios && cap sync ios
scripts.mobile:open:ios: npm run mobile:sync:ios && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run mobile:sync:ios && cap run ios
